_comment: Phase 1 / Gate 1 evidence manifest. The detection oracle (safe simulator + benign suite + metrics + runbook). Parsed fail-closed: a missing/malformed artifact is a FAILURE. The simulator and benign suite are TEST ORACLES (worker-write-denied once frozen).

criteria.title: Simulator produces every evasion mode (full, intermittent every-N-bytes, header-only, first-4KB, low-and-slow) with the expected per-mode signal signature
criteria.expected: all 5 modes run; each emits C1 telemetry; format/entropy/header fields match the mode's signature

criteria.title: Simulator is benign by construction: reversible (exact restore), single-directory (path-contained), key-retaining, non-propagating, no network
criteria.expected: restore() restores every byte; writes outside targetDir are rejected; no net/child_process imports in the package

criteria.title: >=20 ransomware behaviors/families and >=4 evasion modes available (AC-DET-06 substrate)
Benign-but-suspicious workload suite runs (backup, compression, video encode, DB maintenance, legitimate FDE) and emits valid benign C1 telemetry
criteria.expected: 5 workloads run; each emits C1-valid telemetry; high-entropy/high-op but ground-truth BENIGN

criteria.title: Metrics collector + report generator produce valid, schema-stable output
criteria.expected: collector scores scenarios; report generator writes well-formed JSON artifacts

criteria.title: Air-gapped real-malware detonation runbook/SOP exists as documentation (written, never executed)
